Container.Overview:
Safely empties Plex library trash by validating mount health before acting. Supports multiple Plex instances, mixed physical/debrid libraries, per-library cron schedules, dry runs, and Discord notifications.
Use the built-in setup wizard at http://[IP]:8222 to configure your Plex instances and libraries — no manual config file editing required. Set your Plex tokens and API keys as environment variables below.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the emptyarr web interface and setup wizard.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent data directory. Stores config.yml and state.json. Create this directory before starting: mkdir -p /mnt/cache/appdata/emptyarr/data

Config.Name: Symlink Media Root
Config.Description: Root path containing your symlink media (debrid/usenet symlinks and mounts). Mount the root folder — the wizard will let you select specific subfolders. The container path must match so symlink targets can resolve.

Config.Name: Physical Media Root
Config.Description: Root path containing your physical media files. Mount the root folder — the wizard will let you select specific subfolders.

Config.Name: Web UI Username (optional)
Config.Description: Username to protect the web UI with basic auth. Leave blank to disable authentication (fine for local network use).

Config.Name: Web UI Password (optional)
Config.Description: Password to protect the web UI. Only used if Username is also set.

Config.Name: Plex Token (Instance 1)
Config.Description: Plex token for your first instance. Rename this variable to match your instance name from the wizard — uppercased with spaces/hyphens as underscores. Example: instance 'My Plex' uses PLEX_TOKEN_MY_PLEX. Find token at: https://support.plex.tv/articles/204059436

Config.Name: Plex Token (Instance 2)
Config.Description: Plex token for a second instance (if you have one). Rename to match your instance name.

Config.Name: Real-Debrid API Key (optional)
Config.Description: Real-Debrid API key for provider health checks. Optional — leave blank to skip. Get yours at: https://real-debrid.com/apitoken

Config.Name: Discord Webhook URL (optional)
Config.Description: Discord webhook URL for notifications. Optional — configure in the setup wizard instead.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Your local timezone for accurate cron scheduling. Examples: America/New_York, America/Denver, Europe/London
